title_header: Tower of God, Episode: 9 - Evankhell's Hell (2F)

dialogue.speaker: RAK
dialogue.line: YOU DAMN LITTLE TURTLES! IF I FIND YOU, I WILL PEEL OFF YOUR SKIN, AND GOBBLE YOU UP!

dialogue.speaker: RAK
dialogue.line: DAMN TURTLES! COME OUT NOW! LET'S FIGHT!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HOW LONG HAS HE BEEN KEEPING THAT UP? HAS HE GONE MAD OR SOMETHING?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: YEAH, WELL, WHATEVER. THE TEST IS ALMOST OVER NOW.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I KNEW IT. OH, IS THE TEST ALREADY OVER?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: EVERYONE STAY WHERE YOU ARE! THE FIRST TEST IS OVER NOW!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: ALL REMAINING REGULARS, STOP WHAT YOU'RE DOING AND LISTEN CAREFULLY! ANY REGULARS FIGHTING FROM NOW ON WILL BE ELIMINATED!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: DRAT... WHAT A RELIEF.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: TO THE 200 REGULARS WHO PASSED THE FIRST TEST, CONGRATULATIONS TO ALL OF YOU! IT MAY SEEM A BIT RUSHED, BUT A SHORT SECOND TEST WILL BE CARRIED OUT RIGHT AWAY!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: EH...? RIGHT NOW...? SIGH, NO TIME TO REST, HUH?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HA HA! JEEZ, HOW SHORT-TEMPERED THEY ARE.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: DON'T BE SO DISAPPOINTED! THE NEXT TEST IS REALLY SIMPLE! NOW HERE IS THE CHALLENGE FOR THE SECOND TEST!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HUH?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THE CHALLENGE IS GETTING TEAMMATES!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THERE ARE 200 REMAINING REGULARS! AMONG THOSE WHO REMAIN, FIND TWO REGULARS TO BE YOUR TEAMMATES! IN SHORT, THIS TEST IS TO MAKE A TEAM OF THREE!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: TEAM OF THREE REGULARS?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: DRAT, IS IT TEAM BUILDING THIS TIME? GOSH.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: FOR YOUR REFERENCE, WE'RE GIVING YOU A FIVE MINUTE TIME LIMIT!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHAT?! FIVE MINUTES YOU SAID?!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: FIVE MINUTES... WHICH MEANS, DO I HAVE TO BE IN A TEAM WITH THESE GUYS (THIS GUY)?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: OK, STARTING NOW, MAKE A TEAM OF THREE. OF COURSE, IF YOU DON'T MAKE A TEAM IN FIVE MINUTES, YOU ARE ELIMINATED! OH, AND ONE MORE THING: TO BE CONSIDERED A TEAM, YOU NEED TO BE TOUCHING SOME PART OF YOUR TEAMMATES' BODIES WHEN THE TIME LIMIT IS OVER!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: SO, EVERYONE, GOOD LUCK! TEST FLOOR INDEED, WHAT A DIFFICULT TEST.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: TO MAKE A TEAM OF THREE IN FIVE MINUTES, YOU HAVE TO MAKE A TEAM WITH THOSE NEARBY. BUT THE ONES NEARBY ARE THE ONES YOU WERE FIGHTING WITH RIGHT BEFORE THE FIRST TEST ENDED. WHICH MEANS, TO MAKE A TEAM IN FIVE MINUTES, IS TO TURN YOUR ENEMIES INTO YOUR ALLIES.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: THERE JUST HAPPENS TO BE THREE OF US HERE, SO I GUESS WE HAVE TO BE IN A TEAM WITH THAT CROCODILE.

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: I HAVE FIVE MINUTES TO GET TWO TEAMMATES?!

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: THIS MEANS I HAVE TO MAKE A TEAM WITH THESE TWO?!

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: WITH THESE MERCILESS MAIDEN WEAPONS?!

dialogue.speaker: KHUN
dialogue.line: DAMN IT, WHAT SHOULD I DO? CAN I FIND TWO OTHERS IN FIVE MINUTES? NO, NOT GOOD. SIGH, IT'S IMPOSSIBLE TO FIND OTHER TEAMMATES RIGHT NOW.

dialogue.speaker: KHUN
dialogue.line: BESIDES, THEY HAVE TERRIFYING POWERS, SO IF I MAKE A TEAM WITH THEM, THEY WOULD BE THE MOST POWERFUL TEAMMATES!

dialogue.speaker: KHUN
dialogue.line: WELL THEN, HEY GUYS! THE FIRST TEST IS OVER NOW, SO LISTEN UP!

dialogue.speaker: KHUN
dialogue.line: I SHOULD MAKE THEM RECONCILE AND GET THE UPPER HAND.

dialogue.speaker: HATZ
dialogue.line: PEACE FOR NOW?

dialogue.speaker: ANAAK
dialogue.line: AGREED.

dialogue.speaker: KHUN
dialogue.line: HUH? THEY MADE UP ALL BY THEMSELVES?! SHOULD I JOIN THEM TOO?

dialogue.speaker: ANAAK
dialogue.line: HEY! WAIT!

dialogue.speaker: HATZ
dialogue.line: WE SHOULD HURRY TO FIND A THIRD TEAMMATE. I WANT SOMEONE STRONG.

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: H-HEY, H-HEY GUYS? I, I'M RIGHT HERE!

dialogue.speaker: HATZ
dialogue.line: BAM, WHAT SHOULD WE DO? SHOULD WE TEAM UP WITH HIM?

dialogue.speaker: ANAAK
dialogue.line: WHAT? UM, DON'T YOU THINK IT'S THE ONLY CHOICE WE HAVE RIGHT NOW? IT WOULD BE HARD TO ESCAPE FROM HIM AND FIND SOMEONE ELSE. WELL...

dialogue.speaker: HATZ
dialogue.line: THAT'S TRUE. THERE'S NO CHOICE BUT TO TEAM UP WITH HIM.

dialogue.speaker: KHUN
dialogue.line: HEY, CROCODILE!

dialogue.speaker: RAK
dialogue.line: A-HA! THERE YOU ARE! LITTLE TURTLES! WAIT! TIME OUT!

dialogue.speaker: KHUN
dialogue.line: TIME OUT?

dialogue.speaker: RAK
dialogue.line: YEAH! I WANT TO SUGGEST SOMETHING!

dialogue.speaker: RAK
dialogue.line: YEAH! AS THE FIRST TEST IS OVER, THERE'S NO REASON FOR US TO FIGHT! DON'T YOU THINK WE SHOULD FIND TEAMMATES NOW? AND LUCKILY, THERE ARE THREE OF US RIGHT HERE!

dialogue.speaker: RAK
dialogue.line: LET'S BE TEAMMATES AND PASS THE TEST!

dialogue.speaker: KHUN
dialogue.line: WHAT? TEAMMATES?

dialogue.speaker: RAK
dialogue.line: HA, AHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA!

dialogue.speaker: RAK
dialogue.line: HA! TEAMMATES? DON'T KID YOURSELF! YOU'RE JUST MY PREY! HUNTERS NEVER TEAM UP WITH THEIR PREY! I'M THE HUNTER RAK WRAITHRAISER!

dialogue.speaker: KHUN
dialogue.line: SIGH, THIS IDIOT.

dialogue.speaker: KHUN
dialogue.line: FINE, RIGHT. IF THAT'S WHAT YOU THINK, WHAT CAN WE DO? I WILL KILL YOU WITHIN ONE MINUTE, AND FIND ANOTHER TEAMMATE.

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: STOP!

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: MR. RAK, YOU SAID YOU WANTED TO HUNT ME, RIGHT? THEN LET ME ASK YOU A QUESTION, MR. RAK, WHAT DO YOU MEAN BY HUNT?

dialogue.speaker: RAK
dialogue.line: TO HUNT IS TO MAKE MYSELF STRONGER! I PUSH THROUGH POWERFUL SHINSU, CHOMP OFF THE SKIN OF THE STRONG, AND GOBBLE THEM UP TO MAKE THEIR STRENGTH MINE! SO I ONLY FIGHT WITH STRONG ENEMIES! I CAME HERE TO FIND RIVALS THAT CAN MAKE ME STRONGER!

dialogue.speaker: RAK
dialogue.line: LIKE YOU AND THAT WEAPON! SO I WILL HUNT YOU AND YOUR WEAPON, AND BECOME STRONGER!

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: ALL RIGHT, MR. RAK, IF THAT'S WHAT YOU WANT, HUNT ME.

dialogue.speaker: RAK
dialogue.line: WHAT? WHAT DID YOU SAY?

dialogue.speaker: RAK
dialogue.line: HAHAHAHAHA! NICE! YOU ARE QUITE A GOOD TURTLE, HUH? GREAT! LET'S FIGHT! OK!

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: HERE. NOW, HUNT ME, MR. RAK.

dialogue.speaker: RAK
dialogue.line: HUH? HUH?

dialogue.speaker: KHUN
dialogue.line: WOW, WAS HE GOING TO DO THAT FROM THE START?

dialogue.speaker: RAK
dialogue.line: HE HAS SOME NERVES! WHAT THE HELL ARE YOU DOING?! HOW COME YOU THREW AWAY YOUR WEAPON?! YOU FOOL! PICK IT BACK UP!

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: NO.

dialogue.speaker: RAK
dialogue.line: IF YOU WANT TO FIGHT ME, FIGHT ME LIKE THIS! HEY! WITHOUT YOUR WEAPON, YOU'RE NOT WORTH HUNTING! PICK IT UP!

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: NO.

dialogue.speaker: RAK
dialogue.line: PICK IT UP!

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: NO.

dialogue.speaker: RAK
dialogue.line: I SAID, PICK IT UP! YOU STUPID IDIOT JERK TURTLE!

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: NO.

dialogue.speaker: RAK
dialogue.line: YOU TURTLE!

dialogue.speaker: KHUN
dialogue.line: GOOD, KILLING TIME LIKE THIS IS BETTER FOR US. HE HAS TO GO UP THE TOWER ANYWAY. CHECKMATE, HE HAS TO JOIN US.

dialogue.speaker: KHUN
dialogue.line: NOW, HEY, MR. CROCODILE, LET'S START THE NEGOTIATION AGAIN.

dialogue.speaker: RAK
dialogue.line: WHAT?! HE'S GONE MAD!

dialogue.speaker: KHUN
dialogue.line: AREN'T YOU GOING UP THE TOWER TO FIND STRONGER PREY? YEAH? THEN ISN'T IT BETTER TO MAKE A TEAM NOW AND GO UP THE TOWER TO FIND STRONGER PREY TO FIGHT LATER? I DON'T UNDERSTAND WHAT YOU'RE DOING.

dialogue.speaker: KHUN
dialogue.line: ISN'T IT MORE IMPORTANT TO GO UP THE TOWER THAN TO HUNT BAM? DON'T YOU AGREE?

dialogue.speaker: RAK
dialogue.line: WHAT ARE YOU TALKING ABOUT, TURTLE? DON'T FOOL ME! YOU'RE AN IDIOT! I ALREADY TOLD YOU THAT I CAME HERE TO HUNT?

dialogue.speaker: RAK
dialogue.line: RIGHT?! I DON'T CARE WHICH FLOOR OF THE TOWER I'M ON! WHAT, WHAT'S WRONG WITH HIM?! HE'S REALLY GONE MAD! IT DOESN'T MATTER WHERE I AM, WHEREVER I MEET A STRONG ENEMY IS MY HUNTING GROUND!

dialogue.speaker: RAK
dialogue.line: IF YOU WON'T PICK UP THE WEAPON, I'LL MAKE YOU!

dialogue.speaker: KHUN
dialogue.line: NEH! I WON'T LET YOU DO THAT! YOU! OUT OF THE WAY!

dialogue.speaker: KHUN
dialogue.line: DAMN! NOW I ONLY HAVE ONE CHOICE LEFT! 55 SECONDS! THE MOMENT THE TIME'S UP, BAM AND I HAVE TO BE TOUCHING THAT CROCODILE!

dialogue.speaker: KHUN
dialogue.line: THEY SAID, 'TO BE CONSIDERED A TEAM, YOU NEED TO BE TOUCHING SOME PART OF YOUR TEAMMATES' BODIES WHEN THE TIME LIMIT IS OVER'! IF WE TOUCH THE CROCODILE AT THE MOMENT THE TEST ENDS, WE WILL BE CONSIDERED A TEAM AND PASS THE TEST! BAM! WE'VE GOT NO CHOICE! WE NEED TO CATCH HIM!

dialogue.speaker: BAM
dialogue.line: AH, OK! UNDERSTOOD!

dialogue.speaker: RAK
dialogue.line: CATCH WHO, LITTLE TURTLES?!

dialogue.speaker: KHUN
dialogue.line: DAMN IT, IT IS HARD TO GET CLOSE WITHOUT ATTACKING HIM. ABOUT 30 SECONDS LEFT NOW. CAN I DODGE HIS ATTACKS AND PROTECT BAM?

dialogue.speaker: RAK
dialogue.line: WHAT?!

dialogue.speaker: KHUN
dialogue.line: DAMN IT! TAKE THAT!

dialogue.speaker: KHUN
dialogue.line: DRAT, I MISSED! BAM! NOW RUN! DAMN IT! THE LENGTH OF THE SPEAR IS...

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THE SECOND TEST IS OVER! THOSE WHO MADE A TEAM, HOLDING ON TO KEEP EACH OTHER! THE THREE PEOPLE HOLDING EACH OTHER AT THIS MOMENT ARE CONSIDERED A TEAM.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: YOU'LL BE SENT TO THE NEXT TEST SPOT!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHAT?!

dialogue.speaker: RAK
dialogue.line: YOU DAMN TURTLES!

summary: The first test concludes, and a second test is immediately announced: form a team of three within five minutes by touching teammates. Khun, Bam, and Rak struggle to form a team, as Rak, the self-proclaimed 'Hunter,' refuses to team up with his 'prey.' Khun attempts to negotiate with Rak, but Bam intervenes by throwing away his weapon, forcing Rak to either hunt him unarmed or accept the team.
